issue_summary: Add GzipCompressorInputStream.Builder allowing to customize the file name and comment Charsets
javadoc_before:
/** * Constructs a new input stream that decompresses gzip-compressed data from the specified input stream. *

* If {@code decompressConcatenated} is {@code false}: This decompressor might read more input than it will actually use. If {@code inputStream} supports * {@code mark} and {@code reset}, then the input position will be adjusted so that it is right after the last byte of the compressed stream. If * {@code mark} isn't supported, the input position will be undefined. * * @param inputStream the InputStream from which this object should be created of * @param decompressConcatenated if true, decompress until the end of the input; if false, stop after the first .gz member * @throws IOException if the stream could not be created */
javadoc_after:
/** * Constructs a new input stream that decompresses gzip-compressed data from the specified input stream. *

* If {@code decompressConcatenated} is {@code false}: This decompressor might read more input than it will actually use. If {@code inputStream} supports * {@code mark} and {@code reset}, then the input position will be adjusted so that it is right after the last byte of the compressed stream. If * {@code mark} isn't supported, the input position will be undefined. *

* * @param inputStream the InputStream from which this object should be created of * @param decompressConcatenated if true, decompress until the end of the input; if false, stop after the first .gz member * @throws IOException if the stream could not be created * @deprecated Use {@link Builder#get()}. */
